title: Multiplayer Dialogue Game
description: End-to-end product roadmap for a multiplayer dialogue game. Designed and executed 100+ A/B and UX experiments, driving a 25% improvement in intended user impact metrics.

title: B2B GTM & Market Strategy
description: Identified a $120M market opportunity through user research and competitive analysis, directly shaping the business model and go-to-market strategy. Secured $200K in funding.

title: Enterprise Product Suite Launch
description: Spearheaded launch of an enterprise product suite across 3 international markets (Denmark, Spain, India), eliminating external tool dependency and reducing procurement costs by 80%.
